title: anagallis monelli var. collina
intro: Anagallis monelli var. collina, also known as Pimpernel or Anagallis, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Primulaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Anagallis monelli var. collina include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Anagallis monelli var. collina include infusions, tinctures, and ointments that can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
